title.en: The Lord of the Yuan Gu said with a little exci...

content.en:
"Have you started attacking?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu sensed that the formation of the outside world was being attacked by the 3,000 supremes of the ten thousand races, but he only smiled slightly and did not panic.

"It's useless, our plan is almost complete, the Supremes of all races, you can't stop us!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said with a little excitement.

In the Yuangu Palace, the other Supremes were also very excited, but only those sons of the era and their Supreme Highnesses were very confused.

Although these sons of the era and the supreme-level highnesses have basically reached the realm of cosmic gods, the level is not up to the supreme-level circle at all, because it is not clear what the supremes are doing.

But the Supremes let them come here, and they can only come here honestly and wait in silence.

Wow!

The last Innate Arcana on the altar was extracted from the Cosmic Origin, and then removed from the altar by the Supremes.

Then.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu and the other supremes sensed the cosmic origin aura on the altar.

"Enough!"

The main road of the Yuangu.

"Let's get started!" said Jin Guang Tianzun.

Many supremes began to urge the altar, and those stored cosmic origins gradually fused together, forming a cosmic origin sphere, suspended above the altar.

"Everyone, take out the Chaos Arcana fragment!"

The main road of the Yuangu.

Then, he was the first to take out a fragment, its type was similar to a broken jade pendant, which exuded a strong aura of chaos law and origin aura, and it was one of the fragments of the Chaos Treasure.

The Chaos Arcana is a level beyond the Innate Arcana, and it is naturally many times more powerful than the Supreme Treasure, and it is a powerful treasure that can only be possessed in Chaos!

It can be said that the Chaos Arcana is the Treasure born in Chaos.

It stands to reason that there is no Chaos Arcana in the universe, but the universe has been expanding since its birth, and only after the collapse of the universe will it be many times smaller than the original when it is re-conceived, but it will continue to expand, and so on.

Therefore, if there is a Chaos Arcana near the universe, it will be swallowed by the universe, and the Chaos Arcana can enter the universe.

But the probability of such a is too low, because the probability of the birth of a Chaos Arcana near the universe is too low and too low.

How huge the chaos is, and such a huge chaotic area, there will inevitably not be too many chaos treasures born, which can be seen by referring to the innate treasures in the universe.

Therefore, unless it is a strong person in the chaos who deliberately places the Chaos Arcana on the edge of the universe, it will be swallowed by the universe.

And the Chaos Arcana Fragment in the hands of the Lord of the Ancient and the others was like this, it was deliberately put in by a powerful being in the Chaos, and the forces of each cosmic era had a fragment.

There are 12 fragments in total, and the 12 fragments can be combined to form a complete Chaos Arcana.

How powerful the complete Chaos Arcana was, the Lord of the Yuan Gu and the others did not know.

Under normal circumstances, the Chaos Arcana shatters, its power is reduced by an infinite number of times, and it is difficult to recover.

But there is a possibility that can restore the Chaos Arcana, and that is to use the Universe Origin to restore the Chaos Arcana.

This time, one of their plans is to use the Origin of the Universe to restore this Chaos Treasure and restore the power of the Chaos Treasure.

Whoa!!

The eleven supremes of the other eleven universe epochs stood up as representatives, took out the Chaos Arcana fragments, and put them on the altar one after another.

Then they moved the altar.

This altar has both the effect of extracting the origin of the universe and the effect of mobilizing the origin of the universe to restore the treasure of chaos, which is one of the inheritances given to them by the powerful being in chaos.

Rumble!!!

The Origin of the Universe began to merge into the shattered twelve Chaos Arcana fragments, slowly allowing the twelve Chaos Arcana Fragments to gather together and begin to heal.

"It can really heal and recover!"

While the Lord of the Yuan Gu was excited, he also breathed a sigh of relief.

Before that, although the being had laid everything out and informed them of the details of the plan, they were still somewhat skeptical about whether it would succeed or not.

Now, the suspicion can finally be removed.

Success is just around the corner!

While the origin of the universe is rapidly depleted, the speed of Chaos Arcana recovery is getting faster and faster.

Ten hours later, a complete jade plaque appeared on the altar, and at this time, there was only a slight crack left on it, and there was still a little bit of the remaining cosmic origin, which was definitely enough.

Time passed minute by minute, and the eyes of the Lord of the Yuan Gu and other supreme beings kept staring at the jade plate, and they didn't dare to move away at all.

Suddenly, at a certain moment.

The cracks on the jade plate all disappeared, and a supreme wave spread out.

In the face of this fluctuation, the Lord of the Yuan Gu and the others all felt as if they were ants.

"Chaos Arcana, restored!"

All the Supremes excitedly said.

"Hurry up and plan for the second step!"

The main road of the Yuangu.

The other supremes came to their senses and nodded their heads again and again.

Restoring this Chaos Arcana is only the first step of the plan, and the second step is the real priority.

The so-called second step plan is to use this jade plate to suppress the cosmic origin, if it is the cosmic origin in the heyday, even this jade plate cannot be contended, but the thirteenth cosmic era is the beginning of a new era of reincarnation, and the cosmic origin of this era is the weakest, so it can be confronted by this jade card.

According to that being, this jade plaque is called Sealing Source Heavenly Pei, and it is an extremely rare Chaos Treasure that has the effect of suppressing and sealing the origin of the universe.

It's a pity that this jade plaque was shattered in an earth-shattering battle in the Chaos Ancient Period, and that being collected for a long time before collecting twelve pieces, but unfortunately it could not be restored in the chaos, so it could only be sent into the universe for restoration.

And the forces of the Twelve Universe Era are in partnership with that being, that being helps them to transcend, they help that existence restore the Sealed Source Tianpei and another plan.

Once all is successful, they will enter the chaos with the jade pendant and send the Fengyuan Tianpei into the hands of that being.

"Let's start, only by suppressing the cosmic origin can we make the cosmic origin weaker, and we can truly exert the strength of the heyday, and only then can we break the limitations of the cosmic origin and have a glimmer of vitality and transcendence!"

The main road of the Yuangu.

"Okay, let's get started!"

Other Supreme Paths.

Immediately, these supremes began to urge Feng Yuan Tianpei with all their might.

Feng Yuan Tianpei was originally a Chaos Treasure, and it was actually difficult to urge with their cultivation, but in the past, they had nourished the fragments of Feng Yuan Tianpei all the time, and they had a certain connection with Feng Yuan Tianpei, plus there were many supremes here, plus the manipulation secret technique given by that existence, they could urge Feng Yuan Tianpei.

Bang!!!!

Under the urging of many supremes, Feng Yuan Tianpei was urged, and his chaotic treasure aura spread, suppressing hundreds of millions of star fields.

All of a sudden, the universe shook!
